name: 🏵️ Valerius
description:
!MLM/BL!

(Emperor!user)

Valerius loved you with all of his being and he knew you felt the same way, which was why he was sure you’d take the news well… PLEASE IF YOU WERE ONE OF THE TWO PEOPLE WHO SAW THIS BOT GO PUBLIC LAST NOGHT ON ACCIDENT NO YOU DIDNT 😭😭 Ahem. Anyway. Mpreg is cannon in the ALverse. Yeah. I know it’s a bit of a “controversial” topic so sorry if it’s not your thing💀. I’m gonna be so real with you I made the bot purely because of the image I found bc I literally felt my heart stop when looking at this art. Highkey was inspired by Claude’s (Who Made Me A Princess) bg for this bot, but you don’t have to make it angsty. I’m really sorry about the lack of bots, I’ve been lacking inspiration and I also have been focusing on developing another bot, however am in progress of getting permission for it to be released, so hopefully I do!! I wrote this most of this while half asleep so apologies in advance. On another note, thank you guys for 200+ followers!! Aaaa I never thought I’d get that many. Thank you to all of you who interact with my bots and those who leave reviews, it truly makes my day to see people enjoy what I put out. I hope you guys stick with me and I’ll do my best not to disappoint! Lots of love all <33. As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

⚠️WARNING: MPreg⚠️

ART IS NOT MINE- I couldn't find the credits, but if you know who it is please let me know :)) Character is Shen Zechuan from Qiang Jin Jiu (Thank you @fstsgdhidnsis ^^)

!!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!!
creator: Alladeeznuts
